papers.title: A hybrid neighborhood enhanced contrastive learning and self-knowledge distillation method for scRNA-seq data clustering analysis
papers.summary: Abstract Motivation Single-cell heterogeneity analysis faces significant challenges due to the high dimensionality, complexity, and noise inherent in scRNA-seq data, especially when aiming for precise cell type classification. Existing analytical methods often exhibit limited generalization ability and adaptability across different biological contexts, leading to biased identification of cell subpopulations and hindering a comprehensive understanding of diseases, therapeutic responses, and biological processes. Results To address these issues, we propose a novel method named scKD, which integrates a hybrid neighbourhood-enhanced comparative learning model with a self-knowledge distillation strategy. scKD enhances clustering accuracy and is capable of accurately identifying both major cell types and rare cell subtypes. Extensive evaluations on multiple real-world datasets demonstrate that scKD achieves superior performance in subpopulation identification, clustering stability, and robustness. These results suggest that scKD is a powerful and reliable tool for analyzing single-cell transcriptomic data, facilitating deeper insights into cellular heterogeneity. Availability All datasets used in this study are publicly available. Detailed information about all the single-cell datasets analyzed in this paper is provided in Supplementary Table 1. All datasets can be accessed at https://zenodo.org/records/15412380 . The source code is available at https://github.com/A-qlh/sckd
papers.abstract:
MOTIVATION: Single-cell heterogeneity analysis faces significant challenges due to the high dimensionality, complexity, and noise inherent in scRNA-seq data, especially when aiming for precise cell type classification. Existing analytical methods often exhibit limited generalization ability and adaptability across different biological contexts, leading to biased identification of cell subpopulations and hindering a comprehensive understanding of diseases, therapeutic responses, and biological processes.

RESULTS: To address these issues, we propose a novel method named scKD, which integrates a hybrid neighbourhood-enhanced comparative learning model with a self-knowledge distillation strategy. scKD enhances clustering accuracy and is capable of accurately identifying both major cell types and rare cell subtypes. Extensive evaluations on multiple real-world datasets demonstrate that scKD achieves superior performance in subpopulation identification, clustering stability, and robustness. These results suggest that scKD is a powerful and reliable tool for analyzing single-cell transcriptomic data, facilitating deeper insights into cellular heterogeneity.

AVAILABILITY: All datasets used in this study are publicly available. Detailed information about all the single-cell datasets analyzed in this paper is provided in Supplementary Table 1. All datasets can be accessed at https://zenodo.org/records/15412380. The source code is available at https://github.com/A-qlh/sckd.

SUPPLEMENTARY INFORMATION: Supplementary data are available at Bioinformatics online.

papers.llm_title_zh: 用于scRNA-seq数据聚类分析的混合邻域增强对比学习与自知识蒸馏方法
papers.llm_title_bilingual: 用于scRNA-seq数据聚类分析的混合邻域增强对比学习与自知识蒸馏方法 / A hybrid neighborhood enhanced contrastive learning and self-knowledge distillation method for scRNA-seq data clustering analysis
papers.llm_research_question_zh: 如何针对scRNA-seq数据的高维性、复杂性与噪声问题，构建兼具泛化能力、适应性、聚类准确性及稳健性的单细胞聚类方法，以更准确识别主要细胞类型和罕见细胞亚型？
llm_highlights_zh: 提出scKD方法，将混合邻域增强对比学习与自知识蒸馏相结合用于scRNA-seq聚类分析。
在多个真实数据集上，scKD提升了细胞亚群识别能力，并可识别主要细胞类型及罕见细胞亚型。
该方法在聚类稳定性与稳健性方面表现更优，可用于深入解析细胞异质性。
papers.llm_rss_summary_zh: 该研究提出用于scRNA-seq数据聚类分析的scKD方法，将混合邻域增强对比学习与自知识蒸馏相结合，以应对单细胞数据高维、复杂和噪声带来的细胞类型分类困难。多数据集评估显示，scKD在细胞亚群识别、聚类稳定性和稳健性方面优于现有方法，并可同时识别主要细胞类型及罕见细胞亚型。
papers.llm_pubmed_abstract_zh:
研究动机：单细胞异质性分析因scRNA-seq数据固有的高维性、复杂性和噪声而面临显著挑战，尤其是在精确细胞类型分类方面。现有分析方法在不同生物学背景中的泛化能力和适应性往往有限，易导致细胞亚群识别偏倚，从而妨碍对疾病、治疗反应及生物过程的全面理解。

研究结果：为解决上述问题，作者提出一种名为scKD的新方法，将混合邻域增强对比学习模型与自知识蒸馏策略相结合。scKD可提高聚类准确性，并能够准确识别主要细胞类型和罕见细胞亚型。在多个真实世界数据集上的广泛评估表明，scKD在亚群识别、聚类稳定性和稳健性方面具有更优表现。这些结果提示，scKD是分析单细胞转录组数据的一种强大且可靠的工具，有助于更深入地揭示细胞异质性。

可用性：本研究所用全部数据集均为公开可得。本文分析的所有单细胞数据集详细信息见补充表1，数据可通过 https://zenodo.org/records/15412380 获取。源代码可通过 https://github.com/A-qlh/sckd 获取。

补充信息：补充数据可于Bioinformatics在线版获取。
